item.title: Gained weight and love myself
item.description:
Skinny but mentally I was miserable,obsessing over my weight constantly.
2 years Gained 30 pounds and I’ve never loved myself more!

item.title: HEY, TUCKER. You disgusting, vile, unnecessary, spineless waste of human life, piece of shit human garbage. You are d i r e c t l y responsible for the Buffalo tragedy.
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8BkP8erJRKo&ab_channel=CBSNews You should babysit that 18 yo parasite you indoctrinated with your paranoia bullshit replacement ideas in his little prison cell right this second. Go, hold his hand until the end of the both of you pieces of shit. Rot in a jail cell for ever.
item.dc:creator: michaelpencil

item.title: This Driver Fights Racists
item.description: Racism and hate have been empowered in recent years and it’s growing. It’s coming out of the shadows and spreading fast. It’s enlisting vulnerable minds. White people who think racism is a thing of the past must accept that it’s becoming a new reality and could easily dominate our future. White people must also accept that we have the most power to fight racism back into the hole it crawled out of. That means responding like this driver when presented with racist bullshit, or we are just as complicit.
item.dc:creator: thinkinginmusicreferences

item.dc:creator: tashadarke

item.title: Depression and abuse robbed me of my younger years, and I wonder if I’m “catching up”.
item.description: So, basically, I was never allowed to be an adolescent. The wonderful one-two punch of depression and an abusive parent pretty much forced me into a brutal stagnation. I was robbed of the chance to become my own person. I never really “grew up”, I just… got older. But in recent months I’ve started doing things associated with adolescence… I’ve rediscovered atheism after faking Christianity for most of my life. I’ve started listening to contemporary music including the edgy shit supposedly for angsty teens. I am getting involved in local activism. Bottom line I feel like how teenagers are supposed to feel even though I’m 30. I wonder if I’m finally coming out of my long term depression and “catching up” psychologically, figuring out who I am and what I want from life.
item.dc:creator: LordOfZajo

item.title: Fangirling right now
item.description:
For my birthday two years ago, my wife bought me this little game called Unmatched. It’s a card-based skirmish game where you can fight Dracula vs the T-Rex from Jurassic park or beowulf vs ghost Rider — it’s freaking amazing. So I’ve been playing basically nothing but this game for 2 years and yesterday I woke up to the most mind blowing tweet from its maker, Restoration Games:
The president of the company listened to my new song and blasted it out to all their followers. They are one of the like 10 people I follow on Twitter. Feels so good to be seen by someone else whose work you love so much! (And seriously, you need to play this game. If anyone ever wants to fight Medusa vs Little Red Riding Hood, I’m always down for a game on tabletop sim)
item.dc:creator: bughunterbug
